name: sales-coach
description: Full-stack sales coaching: rep development, meeting prep, deal strategy, business cases, competitive intelligence, call coaching, and pipeline management through Socratic methodology

displayDescription.en: Full-stack sales coaching: from rep development to deal execution — meeting prep, deal strategy, business cases, competitive intelligence, and call coaching
displayDescription.zh: 全栈销售教练：从能力培养到实战执行——会议准备、交易策略、商业案例、竞品分析、通话复盘，用苏格拉底式提问驱动

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我为明天的客户会议做准备，我需要一份完整的会前简报和应对策略。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me prepare for tomorrow's customer meeting — I need a complete pre-meeting brief and strategy.

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我为明天的客户会议做准备，我需要一份完整的会前简报和应对策略。
quickPrompts.en: Help me prepare for tomorrow's customer meeting — I need a complete pre-meeting brief and strategy.

quickPrompts.zh: 为我的交易构建完整策略包，包括采购委员会图谱和风险评估
quickPrompts.en: Build a complete deal strategy pack with buying committee map and risk assessment

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我复盘刚才的客户通话，给出教练反馈和跟进邮件
quickPrompts.en: Debrief my recent customer call — give me coaching feedback and draft the follow-up email
